name: I Speak a Little of That

system.description: Choose one culture: European, Asian, African. You are fluent in all Lingua Franca of that culture. Additionally, when you encounter any language outside your fluency in any context (ancient inscription, isolated tribesman, etc), roll +Brains:

failure.value: You speak a few words in the language, but will need to find an expert to do more than order coffee or find the bathroom.

partial.value: You have some familiarity with the language. You get -1 on all related rolls.

success.value: You are fluent in the language, and get +0 on all related rolls.

critical.value: You speak the language like a native. You get +1 on all rolls where that language would come into play, such as Convince!, 3rd Degree!, Investigate, etc.
